description: Re-run Leiden inside each of the top-15 largest clusters (min size 100) to find sub-domains; label each sub-cluster by dominant module.
motivation: Test whether the recovered domain structure is hierarchical.
formal_results: 84,228 theorems mapped to [top_cluster, sub_cluster]; 447 sub-clusters (e.g. LinearAlgebra 42, Order 8).
results_description: Top-level clusters split into plausible finer sub-domains.
conclusions: Sub-domain structure appears present but is only a preliminary observation, not yet validated against Mathlib's own module hierarchy.
